title: Amazon Fargate Task
description: Represents an Amazon Fargate task with its associated configuration, state, and metadata.

taskArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the task

taskDefinitionArn.description: The ARN of the task definition that created the task

clusterArn.description: The ARN of the cluster that hosts the task

launchType.description: The launch type on which the task is running

lastStatus.description: The last known status of the task

desiredStatus.description: The desired status of the task

cpu.description: The number of CPU units used by the task

memory.description: The amount of memory (in MiB) used by the task

containers.description: The containers associated with the task

platformVersion.description: The Fargate platform version on which the task is running

createdAt.description: The time the task was created
